notes: The shared-drive materials are treated as real Bay Baby source evidence, not demo data.
Most source files were prepared for PrimusGFS v3.2-era audits and need review before relying on them for v4.0 scoring.
HeavyConnect contains more template features than Bay Baby uses; this app should prioritize Bay Baby's active modules and forms.

optional_or_unused.reason: No current Bay Baby indoor agriculture scope found in the supplied PRIMUS folders.
HeavyConnect has many templates outside the Bay Baby Primus workflow; keep them in the library but out of readiness scoring until Bay Baby confirms use.
